description: LiberLive C2 accompaniment/chord and drum patterns decoded from OTA-SOUND_C2 files.json; each pattern has note events and a standalone MIDI file.

compatibility.chordPatternUsage: For chord patterns, notes are relative template pitches. To render a song chord, transpose/voice-map template pitches according to chord root/type.
compatibility.drumPatternUsage: For drum patterns, play on MIDI channel 10 or map pitches to your drum sampler.
compatibility.noMissingPolicy: All 354 OTA patterns have notes and a generated MIDI file in pattern_midis/.
